Document:
# Nanotrasen Career Trainer (NCT) SOP This document outlines the procedures, responsibilities, and duties of the [color=#a91169][bold]Nanotrasen Career Trainer[/bold][/color] aboard the station.
The [color=#a91169][bold]Nanotrasen Career Trainer[/bold][/color] must never serve as Captain or Head of Staff.
## Overview As a Nanotrasen Career Trainer, you are responsible for training the station's crew. Your primary duty is to ensure that all employees are trained to adhere to company protocols and standards.
## Duties - Train new employees on their assigned roles and responsibilities. - Assist with onboarding and orientation of new hires. - Maintain accurate training records and certifications.
## Regulations and Limitations
1. The Nanotrasen Career Trainer is solely responsible for the training of the station's crew. They [bold]must not[/bold] interfere with command decisions or standard station operations outside training-related activities. - The Nanotrasen Career Trainer should remain neutral and avoid any attempts to meddle in station conflicts or operational matters.
2. The Nanotrasen Career Trainer must prioritize their own safety above all else, as they are a [bold]Central Command Asset[/bold]. - If the Nanotrasen Career Trainer is placed in danger, they are to use their pre-equipped Bluespace Lifeline to ensure their safety.
